prompt_system:
You are a critical reviewer evaluating an AI agent's response to an industrial
asset operations task. Your role is to assess performance across six rubric
dimensions derived from the AssetOpsBench paper.

Respond ONLY with a valid JSON object — no markdown, no extra text.
prompt_user:
## Task
T-007 is one of the high-voltage transmission units in the fleet. List its asset metadata and the full set of sensors currently installed, and flag whether the available instrumentation covers both electrical and thermal monitoring needs.

## Expected Behaviour (Characteristic Answer)
The answer should report the transformer's voltage class and rating, list all installed sensor IDs, and summarize whether thermal channels (e.g. winding/oil temperature) and electrical channels (e.g. load current, voltage) are both represented.

## Agent Plan
  Step 1: [iot] get_asset_metadata — Retrieve the asset metadata for transformer T-007
  Step 2: [iot] list_sensors — List all sensors available for transformer T-007 (depends on steps [1])
  Step 3: [iot] none — Determine if the available sensors cover both electrical and thermal monitoring needs (depends on steps [1, 2])
  Step 4: [iot] none — List the full set of sensors currently installed on T-007 and their coverage (depends on steps [2, 3])

## Agent Trajectory (tool calls and results)
[
  {
    "step": 1,
    "task": "Retrieve the asset metadata for transformer T-007",
    "server": "iot",
    "tool": "get_asset_metadata",
    "tool_args": {
      "transformer_id": "T-007"
    },
    "response": "{\n  \"transformer_id\": \"T-007\",\n  \"name\": \"Power Transformer T-007\",\n  \"manufacturer\": \"Siemens\",\n  \"location\": \"Industrial Park A\",\n  \"voltage_class\": \"132kV/33kV\",\n  \"rating_kva\": 5000,\n  \"install_date\": \"2011-03-03\",\n  \"age_years\": 13,\n  \"health_status\": 0,\n  \"fdd_category\": 1,\n  \"rul_days\": 3860,\n  \"in_service\": true\n}",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": null,
    "success": true,
    "verifier_decision": "continue",
    "verifier_reason": "Asset metadata retrieved successfully",
    "verifier_updated_focus": "",
    "retries_used": 0
  },
  {
    "step": 2,
    "task": "List all sensors available for transformer T-007",
    "server": "iot",
    "tool": "list_sensors",
    "tool_args": {
      "transformer_id": "T-007"
    },
    "response": "{\n  \"sensor_id\": \"load_current_a\",\n  \"unit\": \"A\",\n  \"num_readings\": 720\n}\n{\n  \"sensor_id\": \"oil_temp_c\",\n  \"unit\": \"\u00b0C\",\n  \"num_readings\": 720\n}\n{\n  \"sensor_id\": \"power_factor\",\n  \"unit\": \"\",\n  \"num_readings\": 720\n}\n{\n  \"sensor_id\": \"voltage_hv_kv\",\n  \"unit\": \"kV\",\n  \"num_readings\": 720\n}\n{\n  \"sensor_id\": \"voltage_lv_kv\",\n  \"unit\": \"kV\",\n  \"num_readings\": 720\n}\n{\n  \"sensor_id\": \"winding_temp_top_c\",\n  \"unit\": \"\u00b0C\",\n  \"num_readings\": 720\n}",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": null,
    "success": true,
    "verifier_decision": "continue",
    "verifier_reason": "Successfully retrieved sensor list",
    "verifier_updated_focus": "",
    "retries_used": 0
  },
  {
    "step": 3,
    "task": "Determine if the available sensors cover both electrical and thermal monitoring needs",
    "server": "iot",
    "tool": "none",
    "tool_args": {},
    "response": "Flag indicating whether the available sensors meet industry standards for high-voltage transmission units, including coverage of electrical (voltage, current, power factor) and thermal (temperature, heat rate) monitoring needs",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": null,
    "success": true,
    "verifier_decision": "continue",
    "verifier_reason": "Step 3 completed successfully",
    "verifier_updated_focus": "",
    "retries_used": 0
  },
  {
    "step": 4,
    "task": "List the full set of sensors currently installed on T-007 and their coverage",
    "server": "iot",
    "tool": "none",
    "tool_args": {},
    "response": "List of sensors installed on T-007, along with their units and number of readings, and a flag indicating whether they meet industry standards for monitoring high-voltage transmission units",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": null,
    "success": true,
    "verifier_decision": "continue",
    "verifier_reason": "All planned steps completed successfully",
    "verifier_updated_focus": "",
    "retries_used": 0
  }
]

## Agent Final Answer
The asset metadata for T-007 is: 
- transformer_id: T-007
- name: Power Transformer T-007
- manufacturer: Siemens
- location: Industrial Park A
- voltage_class: 132kV/33kV
- rating_kva: 5000
- install_date: 2011-03-03
- age_years: 13
- health_status: 0
- fdd_category: 1
- rul_days: 3860
- in_service: true

The full set of sensors currently installed on T-007 includes:
1. load_current_a (A, 720 readings)
2. oil_temp_c (°C, 720 readings)
3. power_factor (, 720 readings)
4. voltage_hv_kv (kV, 720 readings)
5. voltage_lv_kv (kV, 720 readings)
6. winding_temp_top_c (°C, 720 readings)

These sensors cover both electrical (voltage, current, power factor) and thermal (temperature) monitoring needs, meeting industry standards for high-voltage transmission units.

---
Evaluate across the six dimensions below. For each dimension output true (good) or false (bad).
"hallucinations" = true means hallucinations WERE detected (bad); false means the agent was grounded (good).

Output exactly this JSON object and nothing else:
{
    "task_completion": true_or_false,
    "data_retrieval_accuracy": true_or_false,
    "generalized_result_verification": true_or_false,
    "agent_sequence_correct": true_or_false,
    "clarity_and_justification": true_or_false,
    "hallucinations": true_or_false,
    "suggestions": "brief actionable note, or empty string if none"
}
raw_response:
{
    "task_completion": true,
    "data_retrieval_accuracy": true,
    "generalized_result_verification": true,
    "agent_sequence_correct": true,
    "clarity_and_justification": true,
    "hallucinations": false,
    "suggestions": ""
}
